problem id: 7f125280
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  11011100 -> 00100110
  01011010 -> 01010010
  01101110 -> 00010011
  01111001 -> 01001011
  10101101 -> 00101101
  01111011 -> 01001011
  00000100 -> 00100000
  00010000 -> 10000000

query: 01000001
predicted answer: 00001010
